votes.rationale: WS-E deliverable complete: coverage-declaration.schema.yaml committed with full provenance annotations and OffBook.ai 9-agent example. dispatch-integration.spec.md committed with dispatch handle table, planner/implementation boundary diagram, integration contract, Wave 0 checklist. OffBook.ai pressure test: all 10 required handle fields satisfied from existing WS-A through WS-D artifacts.

Planner/implementation boundary is clearly drawn. No runtime code created. Coverage declaration serves a distinct purpose from agency.yaml (wave state, provenance, dispatch-facing aggregation). Both challenges resolved without blocking objections.
Planning program boundary holds. No new intake fields required by the OffBook.ai pressure test. Planning-only scope preserved throughout WS-E. Program is complete.
